---
title: "History of the house of Austria: From the Foundation of the Monarchy by Rhodolph of Hapsburgh, to the Death of Leopold, the Second, 1218 to 1792"
---

## History of the house of Austria: From the Foundation of the Monarchy by Rhodolph of Hapsburgh, to the Death of Leopold, the Second, 1218 to 1792

**Author:** William Coxe
**Date:** 1820
**Imprint:** London: Longman

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
